resources.string:
=== Android Server API ===
--- Health --- GET / Server status & Web UI
--- Device --- GET /api/device/info Device information POST /api/device/time Set device time (root) POST /api/device/reboot Reboot device
--- App --- POST /api/app/restart Restart application GET /api/app/update/check Check version POST /api/app/update/upload Upload APK & install
--- Files --- POST /api/files/upload Upload files GET /api/files List files GET /api/files/{name} Download file DELETE /api/files/{name} Delete file
--- Logs --- GET /api/logs List log files GET /api/logs/stats Log statistics GET /api/logs/{name} Download log GET /api/logs/{name}/tail Tail log (?lines=N) DELETE /api/logs/{name} Delete log DELETE /api/logs Clear all logs POST /api/logs/clean Clean old logs (?days=7)
--- Logcat --- GET /api/logcat Get logcat (?lines=N&filter=TAG) POST /api/logcat/export Export logcat (?lines=N) DELETE /api/logcat Clear logcat buffer
--- System --- GET /api/system/status System status
--- Config --- GET /api/config Get server config POST /api/config/port Change port POST /api/config/logs Change log settings POST /api/config/restart Restart server
=== Usage ===
# Get config: curl http://IP:8080/api/config
# Change port: curl -X POST http://IP:8080/api/config/port -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"port\":9090}"
# Restart server: curl -X POST http://IP:8080/api/config/restart
# Set device time: curl -X POST http://IP:8080/api/device/time -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"timezone\":\"Asia/Shanghai\"}"
